section.heading: Transfer of funds among Federal agencies

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: Subject to subsection (c), for purposes of this subtitle, each Commission may transfer funds to and accept transfers of funds from other Federal agencies.

subsection.heading: Transfer of Funds to Other Federal Agencies.—
subsection.content: Funds made available to a Commission may be transferred to other Federal agencies if the funds are used consistently with the purposes for which the funds were specifically authorized and appropriated.

subsection.heading: Transfer of Funds From Other Federal Agencies.—
subsection.chapeau: Funds may be transferred to any Commission under this section if—

paragraph.content: the statutory authority for the funds provided by the Federal agency does not expressly prohibit use of funds for authorities being carried out by a Commission; and
the Federal agency that provides the funds determines that the activities for which the funds are to be used are otherwise eligible for funding under such a statutory authority.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 15308 was renumbered section 15309 of this title.
